name: Cappucino Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Stir together wafer crumbs and cinnamon.
3. Press mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
4. Beat cream cheese until light and fluffy.
5. Gradually beat in sugar and cocoa powder.
6. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
7. Stir in sour cream, coffee liqueur, and vanilla extract.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan.
9. Bake for 30 minutes or until set.
10. Spread remaining sour cream evenly over the top of the cake.
11. Return to oven for 1 minute to glaze the top.
12. Allow the cake to cool to room temperature, then chill thoroughly, covered.
13. Remove from springform pan.
14. Just before serving, dust the top with cocoa powder.
